nasb.text: Why should the name of our father be withdrawn from among his family because he had no son? Give us a possession among our father’s brothers.”

esv.text: Why should the name of our father be taken away from his clan because he had no son? Give to us a possession among our father’s brothers.”

cnv.text: 為甚麼因為我們的父親沒有兒子，就把他的名從他的家族中除掉呢？求你在我們父親的兄弟中，給我們產業。”

ccb.text: 难道因为他没有儿子，他的名字就要从族中消失吗？请让我们在父亲的家族中分一份产业吧。”
